name: Chicken-Filled Puffs
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely chopped cooked chicken or 3 cans (6 3/4 oz each) drained chicken
1 tbsp Finely chopped onion or 1/2 tsp instant minced onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified on the Mini Puffs packaging.
2. In a large bowl, combine the mini puffs and the chicken or canned chicken.
3. Add the mayonnaise or salad dressing, finely chopped onion, lemon juice, ground ginger, salt, pepper, and celery to the bowl.
4. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
5. Form the mixture into small puffs using a piping bag or plastic bag with a small opening.
6. Place the filled puffs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in the preheated oven according to the package instructions, typically 300°F (150°C) for about 15-20 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
